summary: Universal Generation Status Page Verification COMPLETE - 15/15 backend tests passed, frontend UI verified. All key features working: status endpoint returns timing (elapsed_seconds, eta_seconds), retry_info, notification_opt_in; notification subscribe endpoint works; validate-asset returns correct ui_state; input phase has all form fields; postgen phase shows action buttons; mobile responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: story_engine_routes.py: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns timing.elapsed_seconds and timing.eta_seconds - VERIFIED (lines 519-530)
story_engine_routes.py: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns retry_info object with can_retry, current_attempt, max_attempts - VERIFIED (lines 573-581)
story_engine_routes.py: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns notification_opt_in field - VERIFIED (line 556)
story_engine_routes.py: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns progress and current_step - VERIFIED (lines 538-540)
notification_routes.py: POST /api/notifications/generation/{job_id}/subscribe works and returns 404 for nonexistent jobs - VERIFIED (lines 106-118)
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Input phase has title-input, story-textarea, style-grid, generate-btn - VERIFIED
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Postgen phase shows Download, Share, Continue, Remix, Watch/Preview buttons - VERIFIED
StoryVideoPipeline.js: ForceShareGate modal appears for completed jobs - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and story_engine jobs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal Generation Status Page features fully verified in iteration 389. Key findings: 1) Backend status endpoint returns timing.elapsed_seconds and timing.eta_seconds (eta_seconds is null for completed jobs), 2) notification_opt_in field tracks whether user subscribed to completion notifications, 3) retry_info object contains can_retry, current_attempt, max_attempts, heartbeat_detail, last_error_stage, 4) POST /api/notifications/generation/{job_id}/subscribe returns 404 for nonexistent jobs and 200 for existing jobs, 5) All ProgressiveGeneration.js data-testid attributes verified in source code, 6) Input phase has all form fields (title, story, animation styles, age groups, voice presets), 7) Postgen phase shows action buttons (Download, Share, Continue, Remix, Watch/Preview), 8) ForceShareGate modal appears when viewing completed jobs, 9) Mobile responsiveness verified - page scales properly on 390x844 viewport, 10) Recent jobs sidebar shows user's completed jobs.

status_timing_eta_seconds.details: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns timing.eta_seconds (null for completed jobs)

status_retry_info.details: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns retry_info with can_retry, current_attempt, max_attempts

completed_job_output_url.details: Completed jobs have output_url for Watch/Download

input_phase_form_fields.details: Input phase has title-input, story-textarea, style-grid (6 styles), age options (5), voice options (5), generate-btn

postgen_phase_actions.details: Postgen phase shows Download, Share, Continue, Remix, Watch/Preview buttons

force_share_gate_modal.details: ForceShareGate modal appears when viewing completed jobs with share options

mobile_responsiveness.details: Page scales properly on mobile viewport (390x844), all form elements visible

recent_jobs_sidebar.details: Recent jobs sidebar shows user's completed jobs with click-to-view functionality

progressive_generation_testids.details: All 12 required data-testid attributes present in ProgressiveGeneration.js

notification_subscribe_success.message: You'll be notified when it's ready.
